LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFFS JASON JOHNSON, JENNIE JOHNSON AND JOAQUIN JOHNSON'S MOTION FOR COMPLETE CONSOLIDATION OF CASE NO. CGC-16-549897 WITH CASE NO. CIVDS 1600410 - PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR CONSOLIDATION OF THIS CASE WITH A CASE PENDING IN UPLAND IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO REFILING THE MOTION IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.500. BECAUSE THIS MOTION SEEKS TO BRING TWO CASES IN TWO DIFFERENT COUNTIES TOGETHER, IT IS NOT PROPERLY A MOTION FOR CONSOLIDATION, BUT SEEKS COORDINATION OF THE TWO CASES. ASSUMING THAT NEITHER CASE IS COMPLEX, THE APPLICABLE RULE IS CRC 3.500. PLAINTIFFS HAVE NOT COMPLIED WITH THAT RULE IN SEVERAL MATERIAL RESPECTS. THERE IS NO INDICATION THAT PLAINTIFFS HAVE SOUGHT AGREEMENT AS REQUIRED BY 3.500(B). NOR HAVE PLAINTIFFS PROVIDED THE COURT WITH SUFFICIENT INFORMATION TO MAKE THE REQUIRED FINDINGS PER 3.500(D). PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR #8189

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-23-2018 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-19-2017 Continued To Mar-12-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Complete Consolidation Of Case No. Cgc-16-549897 With Case No. Civds 1600410
Off Calendar Apr-17-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. CHRISTIAN J. AMENDT, TEL. NO. 1-909-469-1000 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS
BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. SHELLEY ANN KRAMER OF THE LAW OFFICES OF RAFFALOW, RHOADS & BRETO, TEL. NO. 1-877-707-7982 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS JASON JOHNSON, JENNIE JOHNSON and JOAQUIN JOHNSON's Motion For Complete Consolidation Of Case No. CGC-16-549897 With Case No. Civds 1600410 - Plaintiffs' motion for consolidation of this case with a case pending in Upland is denied without prejudice to refiling the motion in compliance with CRC 3.500. Because this motion seeks to bring two cases in two different counties together, it is not properly a motion for consolidation, but seeks coordination of the two cases. Assuming that neither case is complex, the applicable rule is CRC 3.500. Plaintiffs have not complied with that rule in several material respects. There is no indication that plaintiffs have sought agreement as required by 3.500(b). Nor have plaintiffs provided the court with sufficient information to make the required findings per 3.500(d). Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-06-2016 Continued To Aug-07-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2016 Set For Trial On Jan-17-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
